text.title: Backlog Grooming and Roadmapping Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Backlog Grooming and Roadmapping end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: cull-stale
step.action: Move 90-day-idle items to 'cull or escalate' list.

step.name: size-and-score
step.action: Ensure size + RICE/WSJF score on every item.

step.name: tag-theme
step.action: Tag each item with theme OR mark theme-orphan.

step.name: assign-horizons
step.action: Move items at most one band; freeze h1m to capacity.

step.name: publish-report
step.action: Emit artefact JSON; share with team.
